about.description: A privacy-first, lightweight note-taking service. Easily capture and share your great thoughts.

auth.host-tip: You are registering as the Site Host.
auth.protected-memo-notice: This memo is not public. Sign in to continue.

demo.banner-description: Changes are temporary and may be reset.

unused.confirm-description: This removes every uploaded file that is not linked to a memo.
unused.description: These uploads were never attached to a memo. Review or remove them here.
unused.title: Unlinked uploads

editor.unsupported-syntax-raw-mode: This memo contains syntax the rich-text editor can't safely edit, so it opened in raw Markdown mode.

audio-recorder.error-description: Try again after checking microphone access for this site.
audio-recorder.idle-description: Start recording to add an audio recording as an attachment.
audio-recorder.ready-description: Preview the clip, then keep it as an audio attachment or discard it.
audio-recorder.recording-description: Capture a quick audio attachment. Current length: {{duration}}
audio-recorder.requesting-permission-description: Allow microphone access in your browser to start recording.
audio-recorder.title: Audio recorder
audio-recorder.unsupported-description: This browser cannot record audio from the memo composer.

editor.media-too-large: Media files must be 10MB or smaller.
editor.media-upload-in-progress: Please wait for the current upload to finish.

kanban-block.select-task: Select a task to see its details

sheets-block.comment-placeholder: Add a note for this cell (empty to remove)
sheets-block.ai-placeholder: Describe the formula, e.g. sum the price column
sheets-block.ai-unsupported: The generated formula uses {{fn}}, which isn't supported. Try rephrasing (only SUM, AVERAGE, MAX, MIN, PRODUCT, IF and basic arithmetic work).
sheets-block.render-error: This sheet couldn't be rendered (likely an invalid formula). Edit the block to fix it; the raw content is shown below.

memo.print-hint: In the print dialog, choose "Save as PDF", and uncheck "Headers and footers" to keep the URL and date off the page.
memo.switch-version-blocked: Current content isn't saved as a version yet. Save a version before switching.
memo.attachment-referenced-title: This attachment is used in a saved version
memo.attachment-referenced-description: Deleting it would make that version permanently incomplete. You can unlink it instead — the file is kept and can be relinked by restoring that version — or delete it anyway.
memo.delete-confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this memo?
memo.delete-confirm-description: This action is irreversible. Attachments, links, and references will also be removed.

share.image-description: Preview rendered at your current device width ({{width}}px).
share.invalid-link: This link is invalid or has expired.
share.no-links: No share links yet. Create one below.
share.title: Share this memo

message.maximum-upload-size-is: Maximum allowed upload size is {{size}} MiB

resource.delete-all-unused-confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all unused resources? THIS ACTION IS IRREVERSIBLE
resource.file-drag-drop-prompt: Drag and drop your file here to upload file
resource.reset-link-prompt: Are you sure you want to reset the link? This will break all current link usages. THIS ACTION IS IRREVERSIBLE

access-token.access-token-deletion: Are you sure you want to delete access token `{{description}}`?
access-token.access-token-deletion-description: This action is irreversible. You will need to update any services using this token to use a new token.
access-token.description: A list of all access tokens for your account.
access-token.title: Access Tokens

account.danger-area-description: Irreversible account actions live here. Review them carefully before continuing.
account.delete-account-description: Permanently remove this account and all associated access from this instance. This action cannot be undone.
account.title: Account Information

ai.byok-description: Connect OpenAI or Gemini with an API key from your own account. Memos calls the provider directly from this server.
ai.byok-key-note: Use a key from your provider account; Memos does not bundle shared AI credentials.
ai.byok-model-note: Memos selects supported models for features like audio transcription.
ai.byok-storage-note: Keys stay on this instance and are masked when settings are loaded.
ai.default-provider-hint: The default provider is used by AI features that don't have their own provider configured.
ai.description: Provider keys are supplied by the instance owner and used by server-side AI features.
ai.dialog-description: Add a key from your own provider account. Memos uses built-in models for each provider; leave the API key blank while editing to keep the stored key.
ai.endpoint-hint: Leave empty to use the official provider endpoint.
ai.integrations-description: Provider keys are supplied by the instance owner and used by server-side AI features.
ai.keep-api-key: Leave blank to keep the existing key
ai.label: AI
ai.models-hint: Add the provider-specific model IDs you want to use (e.g. deepseek-chat, gpt-4o, gemini-2.5-flash).
ai.test-model-required: Add a model before testing the connection.
ai.transcription-description: Speech-to-text settings used when recording audio in the memo composer.
ai.embedding-description: Configure a text-embedding model to enable semantic (vector) search. When unset, search falls back to keyword-only.
ai.embedding-empty-providers: Add an AI integration first to enable semantic search.
ai.embedding-model-help: Embedding model ID (e.g. text-embedding-3-small, text-embedding-004). Changing it rebuilds the index in the background.
ai.embedding-enabled-help: When off, no embedding API is called and semantic search falls back to keyword. Keyword search keeps working. Turning it back on rebuilds the missing vectors in the background.
ai.embedding-warning-no-key: This provider has no API key set; semantic search will not work until one is configured.
ai.transcription-empty-providers: Add an AI integration first to enable transcription.
ai.transcription-language-help: ISO 639-1 short code (e.g. en, de, zh). Leave empty to auto-detect.
ai.transcription-model-help: Free text. Use the provider's model identifier — e.g. whisper-1, gpt-4o-transcribe, whisper-large-v3-turbo.
ai.transcription-prompt-help: Improves spelling of proper nouns and jargon. OpenAI Whisper treats this as a soft hint (Whisper limit is roughly 224 tokens). Gemini treats it as a literal instruction inside the generation prompt.
ai.transcription-prompt-placeholder: Names: Alice, Bob. Glossary: kubernetes, OAuth.
ai.transcription-warning-no-key: The selected provider has no API key set. Edit the integration above to add one.
ai.pdf-text-description: Controls the plain-text panel in the PDF preview.
ai.pdf-text-format-label: Format extracted PDF text with AI
ai.pdf-text-format-help: When on, a PDF's extracted plain text is restructured into Markdown by the default AI provider. When off, the raw extracted text is shown as-is (pages are still separated), avoiding the slow LLM call.

instance.access-description: Control sign-up, authentication, profile editing, and calendar defaults for this instance.
instance.disallow-change-nickname-description: Prevent users from changing their display name.
instance.disallow-change-username-description: Prevent users from changing their login username.
instance.disallow-password-auth-description: Require users to sign in through an identity provider instead of password login.
instance.disallow-user-registration-description: Prevent new users from creating accounts from the sign-up page.
instance.week-start-day-description: Controls the first day shown in calendar-style views.

member.archive-warning: Are you sure you want to archive {{username}}?
member.archive-warning-description: Archiving disables the account. You can restore or delete it later.
member.delete-warning: Are you sure you want to delete {{username}}?
member.label: Member

memo.content-length-limit-description: Maximum memo body size accepted by the server.
memo.double-click-edit-description: Allow users to open memo editing by double-clicking a memo.
memo.editing-description: Control memo editing behavior and server-side content limits.
memo.label: Memo
memo.reactions-description: Define the reaction options users can apply to memos.
memo.title: Memo related settings
memo.reactions-required: Reactions list must not be empty

notification.email-description: Send email copies for memo comments and mentions. Gmail works with smtp.gmail.com, port 587, STARTTLS, and an app password.
notification.email-enabled-description: Email is sent in addition to the in-app inbox notification. Fill the required fields before enabling this for users.
notification.from-email-description: Sender address shown in notification emails. For Gmail, use the same Gmail account as the SMTP username.
notification.from-name-description: Display name shown next to the sender address. Leave blank to show only the email address.
notification.label: Notifications
notification.reply-to-description: Address for replies to notification emails. Leave blank to receive replies at the From email address.
notification.smtp-host-description: SMTP server hostname. Use smtp.gmail.com for Gmail.
notification.smtp-password-description: SMTP password or app-specific token. Gmail requires a Google app password, not your regular account password.
notification.smtp-password-placeholder-existing: Leave blank to keep current password
notification.smtp-password-preserve-description: Leave blank to keep the existing SMTP password. Enter a new app password only when rotating credentials.
notification.smtp-port-description: Use 587 with STARTTLS for Gmail and most providers. Use 465 only when enabling SSL/TLS.
notification.smtp-username-description: Authentication username. Gmail requires your full Gmail address.
notification.test-email-missing-recipient: Set an email address on your account before sending a test email.
notification.use-ssl-description: Use implicit TLS, usually with port 465. Turn this off when using STARTTLS on port 587.
notification.use-tls-description: Upgrade the SMTP connection with STARTTLS. Keep this on for Gmail with port 587.

preference.appearance-description: Choose how the app looks and which language it uses for your account.
preference.default-memo-visibility-description: Visibility applied to newly created memos unless changed in the editor.
preference.label: Preferences
preference.language-description: Updates the interface language immediately and saves it to your account.
preference.memo-defaults-description: Set the defaults used when composing new memos.
preference.mini-menu-description: Shrinks sidebar icons and text for a more compact layout on this device.
preference.theme-description: Applies the selected theme immediately on this device.
preference.search-description: Configure how full-text and semantic search behave.
preference.search-mode-description: Choose keyword, semantic, or a mix of both.
preference.search-max-docs-description: Maximum number of documents returned by a search.
preference.search-rebuild-description: Re-index your documents. Useful if some failed to index (e.g. a temporary embedding error).
preference.search-index-status: Indexed {{done}} · Queued {{pending}} · Failed {{failed}}. Rebuild re-indexes your own documents.

shortcut.delete-confirm: Are you sure you want to delete shortcut `{{title}}`?

sso.accounts-description: Review each identity provider, see the current link state, and connect or disconnect external identities from this account.
sso.basic-settings-description: Set the provider identity, display name, and optional identifier rules before filling in the OAuth details.
sso.client-secret-optional-description: Leave blank to keep the existing client secret unchanged.
sso.configuration-summary-description: Show the essentials that help identify and audit a provider without exposing the full configuration inline.
sso.confirm-delete: Are you sure you want to delete `{{name}}` SSO configuration? THIS ACTION IS IRREVERSIBLE
sso.create-sso-description: Create a new identity provider for administrator-managed single sign-on.
sso.disabled-password-login-warning: Password-login is disabled, be extra careful when removing identity providers
sso.extern-uid-description: This is the provider-side identity currently linked to your account.
sso.identifier-filter-description: Optional regex used to allow or restrict which external identifiers may sign in.
sso.field-mapping-description: Map the upstream profile fields used to identify the user and prefill profile data.
sso.field-mapping-identifier-description: Used as the stable external identifier when signing in or linking an account.
sso.label: SSO
sso.not-linked-description: No external identity is linked yet. You can connect this provider to sign in with it later.
sso.oauth-configuration-description: Fill in the OAuth client credentials and the provider endpoints used during sign-in.
sso.provider-id-description: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. This value becomes part of the provider resource name.
sso.redirect-url-description: Register this callback URL with your identity provider so the authorization code flow can complete.
sso.scopes-description: Separate scopes with spaces. Most providers only need a small set such as profile or email access.
sso.template-description: Start from a provider preset, then adjust the credentials and endpoints for your tenant.
sso.update-sso-description: Review the provider configuration, then save the fields that should change.

storage.backup-path-template-description: S3 object key template for backup files, relative to the configured bucket. Supports {timestamp}, {uuid}, {year}, {month}, {day}, {hour}, {minute}, {second}.
storage.backup-description: Back up the SQLite database (memos, users, settings) to the configured S3 storage. Attachments are not included. Only available for SQLite instances with S3 storage configured; the server also runs this automatically once a week.
storage.delete-blocked-active: This storage source is currently active. Switch to another backend before removing its configuration.
storage.delete-config-warning-description: This removes the saved S3 credentials from the server. You can reconfigure S3 later, but any attachments still stored there will need it re-added to remain accessible.
storage.switch-warning-description: Existing attachments stay in their current location; only new uploads use the new backend. Your data will be spread across multiple storage locations, which makes future migration harder.
storage.accesskey-description: Access key ID for the bucket or S3-compatible service.
storage.bucket-description: Bucket where new attachment objects will be stored.
storage.current-storage-description: Choose where new attachments are stored. Existing attachments remain in their current storage location.
storage.database-description: Store attachment blobs directly in the application database.
storage.database-note-backup: Simple to back up together with notes on small instances.
storage.database-note-size: The database can grow quickly with many or large attachments.
storage.endpoint-description: Service endpoint, such as an AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, MinIO, or other compatible URL.
storage.filepath-template-description: Used by local and S3 storage. Supports {timestamp}, {uuid}, and {filename}. Default: assets/{timestamp}_{uuid}_{filename}.
storage.insecure-skip-tls-verify-description: Disable TLS certificate verification for the S3 endpoint. Enable only for trusted endpoints using a self-signed certificate; this removes protection against man-in-the-middle attacks.
storage.label: Storage
storage.local-description: Store new attachments on the server file system. This is the default for new instances.
storage.local-note-backup: Persist and back up the attachment directory, especially in Docker or container deployments.
storage.local-note-path: Relative paths are written under the instance profile data directory.
storage.path-description: You can use the same dynamic variables from local storage, like {filename}
storage.region-description: Region required by the provider. For some compatible services, any provider-accepted region string is enough.
storage.s3-configuration-description: Configure an S3-compatible bucket for new attachments.
storage.s3-description: Store new attachments in an S3-compatible object storage service.
storage.s3-note-config: Requires a valid endpoint, region, bucket, credentials, permissions, and server network access.
storage.s3-note-scale: Best for large attachment libraries, cloud deployments, or multiple application instances.
storage.secretkey-description: Secret access key for the bucket or S3-compatible service.
storage.secretkey-preserve-description: Leave blank to keep the existing secret key.
storage.update-local-path-description: Local storage path is a relative path to your database file
storage.use-path-style-description: Enable this for providers such as MinIO or some S3-compatible services that do not support virtual-hosted-style buckets.
storage.warning-text: Are you sure you want to delete storage service `{{name}}`? THIS ACTION IS IRREVERSIBLE

system.additional-script-description: Inject JavaScript into every web page. Use only trusted code.
system.additional-style-description: Inject CSS into the web app to adjust instance-wide presentation.
system.basic-description: Configure the public identity shown by this instance.
system.custom-code-description: Optional instance-wide CSS and JavaScript applied to the frontend.
system.disable-password-login-final-warning: Please type `CONFIRM` if you know what you are doing.
system.disable-password-login-warning: This will disable password login for all users. It is not possible to log in without reverting this setting in the database if your configured identity providers fail. You'll also have to be extra careful when removing an identity provider
system.enable-password-login-warning: This will enable password login for all users. Continue only if you want to users to be able to log in using both SSO and password
system.label: System
system.removed-completed-task-list-items: Enable removal of completed task list items
system.title: General

create-dialog.signing-secret-auto-note: A signing secret is generated automatically. You can reveal it after creating.
create-dialog.signing-secret-created-note: Webhook created. Copy the signing secret now — you can also reveal it later from Edit.
create-dialog.title: Title

delete-dialog.delete-webhook-title: Are you sure you want to delete webhook `{{name}}`?

tags.label: Tags
tags.title: Tag metadata
tags.description: Assign optional display colors to tags instance-wide, or blur matching memo content. Tag names are treated as anchored regex patterns.
tags.tag-pattern-hint: Tag name or regex pattern (e.g. project/.* matches all project/ tags)

tag.create-tags-guide: You can create tags by inputting `#tag`.
tag.delete-confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this tag? All related memos will be archived.
tag.rename-error-empty: Tag name cannot be empty or contain spaces
tag.rename-error-repeat: New name cannot be the same as the old name
tag.rename-tip: All your memos with this tag will be updated.

notebook.delete-workspace-confirm: Delete this workspace? It must be empty.
notebook.tags-unavailable: Tag filtering for the document tree is coming soon.
notebook.delete-folder-confirm: Delete this folder? It must be empty.
notebook.select-a-document: Select a document to get started

gallery.properties-placeholder:
title: My gallery
tags: [index, gallery]
status: published
gallery.properties-hint: YAML frontmatter for this view, one "key: value" per line. Lets other galleries filter, sort and reference this view.
gallery.attachments-empty: No attachments yet. Upload files to mount them at the bottom of this view.
gallery.empty-editor: No views yet. Use the + button below to insert a gallery view.
gallery.footer-placeholder: Shown below the gallery — guidance or context for these documents…
gallery.folder-path-placeholder: Folder path relative to knowledge base root (optional, defaults to this folder)
gallery.not-configured: This view has not been configured yet. Switch to edit mode to set it up.
gallery.empty: No documents in this scope yet.

pdf.no-annotations: No notes yet. Toggle "Add a note" and select some text to write one about it.

search.keyword-only-hint: Configure an embedding model to enable semantic search. Showing keyword results only.
